title: Good luck to the ESC team finalists for the 2017-2018 Interclub Season
excerpt: This week the Royal Glenora will be hosting Interclub finals on Saturday, April 28th from 10:45 AM – 4 PM. All are welcome to come watch. Good luck to our teams that have made the finals: Level 2 – Fat and Furious Level 3 – Midcourt Crisis Level 1 Women – Julie Multamaki Level 3 … Read more
content:
This week the Royal Glenora will be hosting Interclub finals on Saturday, April 28th from 10:45 AM – 4 PM. All are welcome to come watch.

Good luck to our teams that have made the finals:

Level 2 – Fat and Furious

Level 3 – Midcourt Crisis

Level 1 Women – Julie Multamaki

Level 3 Women – We are ESC
